headlines.title: Soaring Energy Prices Are Driving a Home Solar Boom

headlines.title: Colombia's Natural Gas Crisis Deepens as Strait of Hormuz Closure Cuts Supply
headlines.summary: Strife-torn Colombia is facing a severe energy crisis at a critical juncture. Global supply of natural gas is heavily constrained due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz after U.S. strikes on Iran. headlines.title: Asia’s Next Energy Hub May Rise in Malaysia
headlines.summary: Global energy market assumptions are breaking down.
